ddls:
CREATE TABLE "signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the signal (e.g., FP1, FP2) */,
  "signal_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal type */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal status */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the signal status */,
  "sampling_rate" REAL /* Sampling rate of the signal */,
  "data_length" INTEGER /* Length of the signal data */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the signal */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the signal was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signals_signal_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_type_id") REFERENCES signal_types ("signal_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signals_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES signal_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signals_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES signal_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_types" (
  "signal_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal type */,
  "signal_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the signal type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the signal type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "association_date" TEXT /* Date of association */,
  "clinician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clinician who made the association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_associations_clinician_id FOREIGN KEY ("clinician_id") REFERENCES clinicians ("clinician_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_associations_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_associations_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinicians" (
  "clinician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinician */,
  "clinician_name" TEXT /* Name of the clinician */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the clinician */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the clinician (e.g., doctor, nurse) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the clinician */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clinician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal being annotated */,
  "clinician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clinician making the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date of the annotation */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_annotations_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_annotations_clinician_id FOREIGN KEY ("clinician_id") REFERENCES clinicians ("clinician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each channel */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the channel */,
  "channel_description" TEXT /* Description of the channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_channels_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_quality_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_quality_metrics_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id")
)
column_names: Name of the signal (e.g., FP1, FP2)
Method used to collect the signal
Unique identifier for each signal type
Date of birth of the patient
ID of the clinician who made the association
Role of the clinician (e.g., doctor, nurse)
ID of the signal being annotated
ID of the clinician making the annotation
